---
title: "Sharing PhD study experiences"
date: 2026-04-29
---

## Slides

<a class="btn btn-success" target="_blank" href="slides/slides.pdf" role="button">{{< fa file-pdf >}} &ensp;Download PDF of all slides</a> <a class="btn btn-success" target="_blank" href="slides/bilingual_speech_script.pdf" role="button">{{< fa file-alt >}} &ensp;Download speech script of the presentation</a>
